meta.title: America's AIM-9 Sidewinder in an air-to-air knife-fighter #fighterjets #usaf #usnavy
meta.description:
The AIM-9 Sidewinder is America's go-to short-range air-to-air missile. 

Stay on top of Defense Tech news by subscribing to Sandboxx!
